title: Nelvaanese
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Language |image= |name=Nelvaanese |users=[[Nelvaanian/Legends|Nelvaanian]]''{{DB|location|nelvaan|Nelvaan}}'' |locations=[[Nelvaan/Legends|Nelvaan]] |script= |dialects= |characteristics= |related= }} {{Quote|When you travel the universe with Qui-Gon Jinn, you tend to learn a few things.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on his ability to understand the language|{{CW|23}}}} '''Nelvaanese''' was the native language of the [[Nelvaanian/Legends|Nelvaanian]] species from [[Nelvaan/Legends|Nelvaan]]. [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] traders incorporated Nelvaanese phrases into trade dialects that could be found in the vicinity of Nelvaan. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] learned some of these dialects while he was traveling with [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]. {{Language-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== Nelvaanese is based on [[Wikipedia:Hungarian language|Hungarian]], probably because [[Genndy Tartakovsky]]'s wife is from Hungary.
Some phrases from ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' are: *''Az ördög az enyém, mindent elrontottál. Ez volt az én próbám'' - The devil is mine. You ruined everything. It was my trial. *''Elrontottátok a tesztet.'' - You messed up the test. (Here, "you" is plural) *''Meg kell ezt beszélnünk Anakitusz szellemével.'' - We must discuss this with the spirit of Anakitus. *''Holt Kezed'' - your dead hand *''Ez egy kicsit fájni fog.'' - This will hurt a bit. ''Apu'' - daddy, father, colloqiual *''[[Orvos]]'' - doctor *''Nem tudtál? Nem tudtál így beszélni?'' - Couldn't you? Couldn't speak this tongue? The speech of mutated Nelvaanians sounds notably different and is based on [[Wikipedia:Russian language|Russian]], which is [[Genndy Tartakovsky]]'s native language.
Some phrases are: *''Ya dolzhen eto ubrat'' ("Я должен это убрать") - I must remove this. *''Ne mozhem bolshe terpet'' ("Не можем больше терпеть") - We cannot tolerate this any longer. *''My mozhem idti domoy. Idyom domoy!" ("Мы можем идти домой. Идем домой!") - We can go home. Let's go home! *''Wam tuda'' ("Вам туда") - That way. ==Appearances== *{{CW|22}} {{1st}} *{{CW|23}} *{{CW|24}} *{{CW|25}} ==Sources== *''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' *{{DB|location|nelvaan|Nelvaan}} {{1stID|Nelvaanese}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Nelvaanese }} [[Category:Languages]] [[Category:Nelvaanian culture]]
